articles.title: New Zealand wins the toss and bowls in the 3rd T20 against South Africa
articles.original_title: New Zealand wins the toss and bowls in the 3rd T20 against South Africa
articles.summary: AUCKLAND, New Zealand (AP) — New Zealand captain Mitchell Santner won the toss and chose to field Friday in the third Twenty20 cricket international against South Africa at Eden Park.The five-match series is level at 1-1 after South Africa won the first match by seven wickets and New Zealand the second by 68 runs.Both teams made one lineup change. South Africa named right-arm pacer Lutho Sipamla in place of Ottneil Baartman while New Zealand recalled Bevon Jacobs in place of Josh Clarkson.___Lin

articles.title: Luka drops 60, gets MVP chants from Heat crowd
articles.original_title: Luka drops 60, gets MVP chants from Heat crowd
articles.summary: Luka Doncic scored 60 points, the first Laker to do so since Kobe Bryant's career finale in 2016, as L.A. won in Miami to push its season-best win streak to eight games.

articles.title: LeBron ties Parish's record with 1,611th game
articles.original_title: LeBron ties Parish's record with 1,611th game
articles.summary: LeBron James tied Robert Parish for the NBA's all-time games-played mark, with the Hall of Famer saying James is "deserving" of breaking the record.

articles.title: Wemby's game winner puts Spurs back in playoffs
articles.original_title: Wemby's game winner puts Spurs back in playoffs
articles.summary: Victor Wembanyama nailed a go-ahead 17-foot fadeaway with 1.1 seconds left Thursday night, and the Spurs clinched a postseason berth for the first time in six seasons.

articles.title: Sources: Heat to waive Rozier before playoffs

articles.summary: The Miami Heat are expected to waive guard Terry Rozier before the end of the regular season to create a roster spot for the team's playoff run, sources confirmed to ESPN.
